obligations: Guidance only; secure onboarding starts in authenticated workflow.
NBBL and BOU approvals are mandatory before production go-live.

S2: Validate segment fit and target use case.
Finalize BOU shortlist with technical fit.
Complete technical design walkthrough with BOU.
Execute UAT scenarios and reconciliation checks.
Address gaps and submit closure evidence.
Obtain final sign-off and go-live window.
S3: Shortlist BOU options for API readiness.
Complete sandbox integration and callback setup.
Execute UAT scripts for bill lifecycle.

micro: Use the lightweight fast-track checklist with minimal integration burden.
Prioritize hosted onboarding option to reduce upfront setup effort.
small: Plan phased rollout starting with one category/state before expansion.
Assign one owner for compliance artefacts and one owner for technical readiness.

offline: Define assisted digitization flow for offline bill presentment and reconciliation.
Prepare field-ops SOP for dispute and exception handling.
online: Finalize API/webhook contract and callback retry policy early.
Set up dashboard-based monitoring for payment and reconciliation events.
